name: Undimensioned and Unseen
intro_text: The creature you have been tracking — the Dunwich Horror — is not alone. Invisible, enormous, and terrifyingly hungry, several of its kin have been sighted throughout the hills surrounding Dunwich.
Armed with a ritual from the Necronomicon (or what knowledge you could piece together), you must hunt them down before they devastate the region.
setup_instructions: Spawn one Dunwich Horror at each of 4 randomly selected locations.
The Dunwich Horrors are invisible — they cannot be damaged normally. Use the ritual to make them vulnerable.
Randomly select which locations are used this scenario (per rulebook).

R1.label: Resolution 1 — All Horrors destroyed
text: Through desperate effort and the power of the ritual, you destroy every last Dunwich Horror. The hills fall silent.
Record in the campaign log: *All Dunwich Horrors were destroyed.* Each investigator earns 3 bonus XP.

R2.label: Resolution 2 — Some Horrors remain
text: You destroy most of the creatures but not all. One or more of the Horrors escapes into the hills.
Record in the campaign log: *Some Dunwich Horrors escaped.* Note how many — each will appear as a penalty in a future scenario.

defeat.label: Defeat — Overwhelmed
text: The Dunwich Horrors prove too much. You are driven from the hills, battered and terrified.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators were defeated at Undimensioned and Unseen.* Each investigator suffers 1 physical and 1 mental trauma.
